title: AI Engineering Leader | Remote (Spain) | Global Fintech
responsibilities: Deliver applied ML solutions into production
Build and ship LLM and NLP use cases
Develop with advanced Python and modern ML frameworks
Design and work within microservices architecture and systems integration constraints
Integrate third-party AI tools and APIs
Lead teams and set technical direction
Communicate effectively in English with stakeholders and collaborators
qualifications: Strong experience delivering applied ML solutions into production
Hands-on expertise with LLMs and NLP use cases
Background in microservices architecture and systems integration
Experience integrating third-party AI tools and APIs
Degree in Computer Science (or related field) required
implied_pain_points: Scaling AI capability with heavy investment in automation and intelligence
Need to productionize applied ML solutions
Need to deliver LLM/NLP use cases
Integration complexity across microservices and systems
Need to integrate third-party AI tools and APIs
Operating within a global fintech/payments context
success_metrics: Applied ML solutions delivered into production reliably
LLM and NLP use cases shipped and operating in production
Microservices and systems integrations implemented without breaking platform reliability
Technical direction established and followed by the team
Clear, effective communication in English across collaboration points
education_requirements: Degree in Computer Science (or related field) required

ideal_candidate_profile.identity_statement: A hands-on AI engineering leader who can deliver applied ML into production and drive LLM/NLP use cases, while leading teams and setting technical direction in a global fintech environment.
key_traits: hands-on with LLMs and NLP use cases
comfortable leading teams and setting technical direction
ideal_candidate_profile.experience_profile: Strong experience delivering applied ML solutions into production; hands-on expertise with LLMs/NLP; advanced Python; AWS; microservices and integrations.
culture_signals: investing heavily in automation and intelligence

explicit_outcomes: Deliver applied ML solutions into production
Build LLM and NLP use cases
delivery_expectations: Ship applied ML solutions into production
Integrate third-party AI tools and APIs

operating_signals: Investing heavily in automation, intelligence, and next-generation solutions
ambiguity_signals: Role category ambiguity: title includes 'Leader' and mentions 'leading teams', but JD does not explicitly state people-management scope (e.g., hiring, performance reviews, direct reports).
Remote policy vs location constraint: described as '100% Remote' but explicitly restricted to Spain.
company_description: An international fintech powering cross-border payments for global merchants across high-growth markets. The business is scaling its AI capability and investing heavily in automation, intelligence, and next-generation solutions.
role_description: AI Engineering Leader role focused on delivering applied ML solutions into production, building LLM and NLP use cases, working with microservices architecture and systems integration, and integrating third-party AI tools and APIs. 100% remote role but must be based in Spain; strong communication skills in English required.
residual_context: 100% Remote – Must be based in Spain! 3 stage interview process.
